name: lol-esports-scraper
description: Scraper de stats joueurs LoL Esports depuis gol.gg

scripts.scrape:2026: tsx leagues/2026/lck-2026/scrape.ts && tsx leagues/2026/lpl-2026/scrape.ts && tsx leagues/2026/lec-2026/scrape.ts && tsx leagues/2026/lcs-2026/scrape.ts && tsx leagues/2026/first-stand-2026/scrape.ts && tsx leagues/2026/lfl-2026/scrape.ts
scripts.scrape:2025: tsx leagues/2025/lck-2025/scrape.ts && tsx leagues/2025/lpl-2025/scrape.ts && tsx leagues/2025/lec-2025/scrape.ts && tsx leagues/2025/lfl-2025/scrape.ts && tsx leagues/2025/first-stand-2025/scrape.ts && tsx leagues/2025/msi-2025/scrape.ts && tsx leagues/2025/worlds-2025/scrape.ts
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,vite -c cyan,yellow "tsx server.ts" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
